Class MockIoTIntegrationService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.mock.MockIoTIntegrationService
All Implemented Interfaces:
IoTIntegrationService
public final class MockIoTIntegrationService extends Object implements IoTIntegrationService
Mock MQTT integration layer for demonstrating optional physical device connectivity.

Implements IoTIntegrationService for testing and demonstration purposes without requiring a real MQTT broker. Simulates device discovery and state changes.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface IoTIntegrationService

    • publishCommand

      public boolean publishCommand(String deviceId, String command)
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Publishes a command to a device's command topic.

      The command is published to smarthome/<deviceId>/cmd. Only successful if connected and the device is paired.

      Specified by:
      publishCommand in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      command - command payload to publish
      Returns:
      true if published successfully, false otherwise

    • getDeviceState

      public String getDeviceState(String deviceId)
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Retrieves the current state of a paired device.

      This may return a cached value if the device has been recently queried.

      Specified by:
      getDeviceState in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      Returns:
      current state string (e.g., "ON", "OFF", temperature value), or null if not found

    • addStateChangeListener

      public void addStateChangeListener(IoTIntegrationService.DeviceStateChangeListener listener)
      Description copied from interface: IoTIntegrationService
      Adds a listener to be notified when a device's state changes via MQTT message.
      Specified by:
      addStateChangeListener in interface IoTIntegrationService
      Parameters:
      listener - callback to invoke with deviceId and new state
